spec.title: Vizard — Showcase
spec.description: A tour of brilliant Vega-Lite charts built with the Vizard builder, driven by Infinity inline data, organized into Grafana 13 tabs.

spec.title: Streamgraph
spec.description: Five flowing series stacked around a centered baseline.

spec.title: Gradient area
spec.description: An area filled with a linear color gradient.

spec.title: Trellis area (small multiples)
spec.description: One area per series, faceted into columns.

spec.title: Ternary plot
spec.description: Three measures projected onto a triangle via builder transforms.

spec.title: Slope chart
spec.description: Change between two points, one line per group.
